generated_parts.label: Flexion-Resistance Actuator x 10
generated_parts.spec: Plug-in tendon brake/clutch actuator module, knuckle row mount, cable pulley, connector pocket, service access

requirements: Plug-in tendon brake/clutch actuator module, knuckle row mount, cable pulley, connector pocket, service access
Battery, sensor, actuator, cartridge, payload, cable, or joint modules remain removable without full teardown
Harnesses, tubes, or service channels are routed through visible raceways or protected channels
Access is represented by geometry: hatch, pocket, channel, fastener pattern, slot, window, or removable cover
Every cable exit shows strain relief geometry (clamp, grommet, tie point) and routing respects a stated minimum bend radius away from moving joints and sharp edges
Connectors are reachable without disassembling structure, have finger/tool clearance, and mention keying or labeling to prevent mis-mating
Per-finger linkage cartridges are removable by single pin or visible hinge access
Flexion-resistance actuator modules plug in and remain visible near knuckle row
Rigid mock assembly preserves soft-contact cues, wrist quick release, and ergonomic clearance
Finger and wrist wiring uses service loops, strain relief at every flex boundary, and a stated bend radius sized for repeated flexion cycles
